channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Experimental pill offers new hope for deadly pancreatic cancer
item.description: A novel pill helped patients with advanced pancreatic cancer live longer, researchers reported Sunday.

item.title: The world's largest permanent desert lake faces rising waters and hungry crocodiles
item.description: Kenya's Lake Turkana, the largest permanent desert lake, has long sustained hundreds of thousands but now faces multiple threats.

item.title: US strikes suspected drug boat in Pacific, killing three in fourth attack this week
item.description: The US military conducted another strike on a suspected drug smuggling boat in the Pacific Ocean, killing three people in the fourth such attack this week.

item.title: Israel expands its footprint through war; some see it as part of a larger plan
item.description: On the far-right fringe of Israel, some activists and political leaders envision a Greater Israel, extending the country's control into neighboring territories.
